summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Key Multi-Provider AI System feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified including AI Settings page, Fallback Chain with priority reorder, Add/Toggle/Delete key functionality, and pricing table.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about duplicate keys in transaction list (BT-d55a8db7-*) - should use unique keys
Console warning about setState during render in BrowserRouter/Login - minor React anti-pattern
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/admin_routes.py - Fixed reorder endpoint (route order + API format)
/app/frontend/src/pages/SuperAdmin.js - Updated reorder API call format to use {key_ids: [...]}
/app/backend/tests/test_ai_keys.py - Created comprehensive AI keys test suite
seed_data_creation: Created test AI key (TEST_UI_OpenAI_Key) during UI testing, deleted after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-key AI system fully implemented. Keys stored in 'ai_keys' collection with priority-based fallback. Reorder endpoint uses POST body {key_ids: [...]}.  Generate endpoint uses generate_with_ai() which tries keys in priority order. All CRUD operations on AI keys tested and working.

tested_features.notes: Returns 3 providers (Gemini: 4 models, Kimi: 2 models, OpenAI: 2 models) with pricing info
Returns all keys masked, sorted by priority, requires auth
Creates key with auto-priority, validates provider/model
Toggle key active status works correctly
Reorders keys by priority, uses {key_ids: [...]} format
Generation works through fallback system (tested with rubrik doc_type)
Shows Fallback Chain card, Add Key button, pricing table
Provider/Model dropdowns with pricing, API key input, label, key URL links
Shows priority numbers, up/down arrows, Utama/Fallback badges, toggle switches, delete buttons
Toggle switch changes key active status
Delete button removes key with confirmation
Shows all 8 models from 3 providers with input/output prices and descriptions

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Reorder endpoint route defined after {key_id} route, causing path conflict
Reorder endpoint used bare list parameter which doesn't work in FastAPI/Pydantic v2
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Created AIKeyReorder model with key_ids field

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Frontend sent bare array to reorder endpoint

mocked_apis_list: Kimi/OpenAI API calls with test keys fail but fallback mechanism works
